def negative_orchestrator_performs_low_level_tokenization_or_parsing():
    rule_id = "orchestrator_performs_low_level_tokenization_or_parsing"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag high-level workflow functions that also own low-level parsing logic better isolated in helpers."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
